# Templates

## Purpose

Use these templates to keep future work package, story, test, release, and handoff notes consistent across humans and AI agents.

## Available Templates

- `ADR_TEMPLATE.md`
- `AGENT_HANDOFF_TEMPLATE.md`
- `STORY_TEMPLATE.md`
- `TEST_PLAN_TEMPLATE.md`
- `TASK_STATE_UPDATE_CHECKLIST.md`
- `RELEASE_GATE_EVIDENCE_TEMPLATE.md`

## Rule

Templates are starting points. Keep requirement IDs, tests, privacy/security notes, rollback, and state-doc updates unless a section is clearly irrelevant.
